reference: If you control your allergies and have no further allergic reactions and do not scratch, continuous application can reduce the marks. Also, avoid mustard, coconut, walnut, groundnut, almonds, and soybean oils. Use olive oil for cooking and application. You will be better sooner.
text: If you control your allergies and have no further allergic reactions, and do not scratch, continuous application can reduce the marks. Also, avoid mustard, coconut, walnut, groundnut, almonds, and soybean oils; use olive oil for cooking and application. You will be better sooner.
